title: High-voltage semiconductor device and method of forming the same
abstract: High-voltage semiconductor device and method of forming the same, the high-voltage semiconductor device includes a substrate, a gate structure, a drain, a first insulating structure and a drain doped region. The gate structure is disposed on the substrate. The drain is disposed in the substrate, at one side of the gate structure. The first insulating structure is disposed on the substrate, under the gate structure to partially overlap with the gate structure. The drain doped region is disposed in the substrate, under the drain and the first insulating structure, and the drain doped region includes a discontinuous bottom surface.
claims: 1. A method of forming a high-voltage semiconductor device, comprising: providing a substrate; forming an insulating structure on the substrate; after forming the insulating structure, forming a drain doped region in the substrate, partially under the insulating structure, wherein the drain doped region comprises a discontinuous bottom surface under the insulating structure; forming a drain in the drain doped region, wherein the drain doped region further comprises a first portion being directly in contact with a bottom surface of the gate structure, and a second portion being formed between the drain and the isolating structure, and the discontinuous bottom surface is formed between the first portion and the second portion of the drain doped region in a horizontal direction; and forming a gate structure on the substrate.
